news.headline: Inside the race to rescue a downed US airman in Iran
news.summary: President Donald Trump on Sunday hailed a daring rescue of a downed US airman in central Iran, but Tehran insisted the mission was “foiled”, leaving the world to sift fact from fiction amid conflicting reports and viral images.

news.headline: China’s push for hydrogen-powered planes takes step forward amid Iran energy crisis
news.summary:
A Chinese cargo plane powered by a hydrogen-fuelled engine has successfully completed its maiden flight, marking a milestone in China’s push for green aviation.

news.headline: Pope Leo calls for global leaders to choose peace in his first Easter Mass
news.summary: Pope Leo XIV addressed thousands of worshippers gathered in St Peter's Square on Easter Sunday in his first address as pontiff.

news.headline: Talk about death comes alive in ageing Hong Kong
news.summary:
Hongkongers are more willing to discuss death including their own funeral wishes in the wake of the Covid pandemic, mass emigration and the deadly Tai Po fire, amid a rapidly ageing population, a death education advocate says.

news.headline: Hong Kong must not undo the good work of its HK$2 transport scheme
news.summary: The HK$2 (US$0.26) transport fare scheme for the elderly is one of Hong Kong’s most socially significant success stories.
